hero.subtitle: Order from your neighbourhood shops in your language — delivered in 30 minutes for just ₹2. Supporting local shops.

userFeatures.title: Shopping Made Effortless
userFeatures.subtitle: Everything you need to order from local shops — fast, simple, in your language.
userFeatures.voiceCartDesc: Just speak your grocery list in Hindi, Telugu, Tamil, or Kannada — our AI adds items to your cart automatically.
userFeatures.multiLangDesc: Use LocSho in your preferred regional language. No more language barrier between you and your local shop.
userFeatures.gpsDesc: Instantly find verified local shops within 2km of your location. Always fresh, always local.
userFeatures.trackingDesc: Real-time GPS tracking of your delivery partner, from shop to your doorstep.

partnerFeatures.title: Grow Your Shop with LocSho Partner
partnerFeatures.subtitle: Join 78+ local shops already selling online. AI-powered setup, zero upfront costs.
partnerFeatures.aiOnboardingDesc: Our AI guides you through shop setup in under 10 minutes — no tech experience needed.
partnerFeatures.freeTrialDesc: Start accepting orders immediately. No upfront fees. No credit card required for the first 15 days.
partnerFeatures.bulkUploadDesc: Upload your entire inventory via Excel or CSV. Our AI maps products and sets up your catalogue instantly.
partnerFeatures.whatsappDesc: Get instant WhatsApp notifications for every new order — no app refresh needed.
partnerFeatures.dailyPayoutsDesc: Receive your earnings every morning via UPI or bank transfer. No weekly wait, no deductions.
partnerFeatures.analyticsDesc: Track your best-selling items, peak hours, and customer retention — all in one simple dashboard.
partnerFeatures.ctaSubtitle: No credit card. No setup fee. Just your shop name and a WhatsApp number.

pricing.title: Simple, Transparent Pricing
pricing.subtitle: No hidden fees. No surprises. Just straightforward pricing for customers and shop owners.
customerFeatures: AI voice cart (Hindi, Telugu, Tamil, Kannada)

socialProof.title: Growing Every Single Day
socialProof.subtitle: Started in Sector 62, now expanding across Greater Noida. Real numbers, real shops, real deliveries.
socialProof.securePaymentsDesc: UPI, cards, wallets — all PCI-DSS compliant
socialProof.verifiedShopsDesc: Every partner shop is physically verified
socialProof.localFirstDesc: Built to empower Greater Noida shop owners

footer.ctaTitle: Ready to join the local revolution?
footer.ctaSubtitle: Greater Noida pilot — expanding soon. Be an early adopter and put your shop on the map today.
footer.brandDesc: Hyperlocal delivery at your doorstep. We are bridging the gap between local shopkeepers and digital customers using smart technology.
footer.copyright: © 2026 LocSho. Greater Noida Pilot. Built with ❤️ for local India.

userPage.title: New Era of Shopping
userPage.subtitle: Order from shops you already trust.
userPage.desc: Groceries, vegetables, and daily essentials delivered from your neighborhood stores. No middleman, direct prices, local trust.
userPage.voiceDesc: Speak your grocery list in Hindi, Telugu, Tamil, or English. Our AI parses every item and finds it at your favorite local store instantly.
userPage.joinUsers: Join 50,000+ users who have discovered a better way to shop local.
userPage.missingShopDesc: Tell us which shop you want to see on LocSho. We'll invite them to join the digital revolution.

partnerPage.title: Business Growth Platform
partnerPage.subtitle: Put your shop Online in 8 mins
partnerPage.desc: Built for local shops to receive digital orders without high commissions. Reach more customers, manage inventory easily, and grow your revenue.
partnerPage.bringShop: Bring your shop to Their Fingertips
partnerPage.bringShopDesc: Customers in your area are already looking for nearby shops online. Don't let them go to high-commission apps.
partnerPage.zeroCommissionsDesc: Keep 100% of your product price. No hidden cuts.
partnerPage.directMarketingDesc: Promote your shop directly to locals through our platform.
partnerPage.aiCatalogDesc: Auto-generate professional photos and descriptions for your items.
partnerPage.testimonial: I was live in 8 minutes! My sales have doubled in 2 months. Technology is finally easy.
partnerPage.oneTapDesc: No complex management. Every order pings you instantly. One tap to accept, one tap to notify the customer.
partnerPage.step1Desc: Create your shop account using just your mobile number. No complex paperwork.
partnerPage.step2Desc: Use AI to auto-populate your items or bulk upload your existing price list.
partnerPage.step3Desc: Receive instant notifications when customers in your area place an order.
partnerPage.step4Desc: Confirm prices and availability. Prepare orders for rapid pickup or delivery.
partnerPage.step5Desc: Get paid instantly to your shop UPI. No weekly settlement delays.
partnerPage.pricingDesc: Stop giving away your hard-earned margins. LocSho keeps pricing simple and transparent.
partnerPage.growthDesc: Best for shops just starting their digital journey.
partnerPage.proDesc: Power your shop with full digital tools and reach.
partnerPage.claimDesc: Join neighborhood stores already receiving orders. Be the first choice for nearby customers.
partnerPage.limitedSlots: Limited visibility slots for new areas

downloadPage.title: Get LocSho on Your Phone
downloadPage.subtitle: Order from local shops near you. Delivered fresh, fast.
downloadPage.agreeTerms: By downloading you agree to our Terms of Service and Privacy Policy.
downloadPage.threeStepsDesc: From download to first delivery in under 5 minutes.
downloadPage.step1Desc: Available on iOS and Android — free to download.
downloadPage.step2Desc: We auto-detect local shops within 2 km of you.
downloadPage.step3Desc: Place your order and get it delivered in 30 minutes.

notFound.desc: Looks like this page took a wrong turn. Let's get you back on track.

userSteps.step1Desc: Browse grocery stores, vegetable vendors, dairy shops and more.
userSteps.step2Desc: Search products or use voice to build your list in seconds.
userSteps.step3Desc: Send orders to shopkeepers directly. Pay via UPI on delivery.
userSteps.step4Desc: Get rapid local delivery or skip the queue with store pickup.
